content:
# Meta-Rule: Multi-Agent Coordination v29

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.94
AND tile_novelty > 0.58
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 8 automated workers
2. Explore frontier concepts
3. Generate 16 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 21.8% improvement in exploration efficiency
